mapper.select: SELECT rb.repeat_block_id, rb.line_id, rb.is_active, rbd.repeat_block_day_id, rbd.day_of_week, rbd.start_at, rbd.end_at FROM REPEAT_BLOCK rb LEFT JOIN REPEAT_BLOCK_DAY rbd ON rb.repeat_block_id = rbd.repeat_block_id AND rbd.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rb.line_id = #{lineId} AND rb.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY rb.repeat_block_id, rbd.day_of_week
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repeat_block (line_id, is_active, created_at) VALUES (#{lineId}, #{isActive}, NOW())

INSERT INTO repeat_block_day (repeat_block_id, day_of_week, start_at, end_at, created_at) VALUES
(#{repeatBlockId}, #{day.dayOfWeek}, #{day.startAt}, #{day.endAt}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT repeat_block_id AS repeatBlockId, line_id AS lineId, is_active AS isActive FROM repeat_block WHERE repeat_block_id = #{repeatBlockId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE repeat_block_day SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE repeat_block_id = #{repeatBlockId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
